headline: Lululemon’s China Renewable Push And What It Means For Weak Shares
summary: Lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU) has announced a major investment in a renewable energy fund focused on its Chinese supply chain. The initiative is intended to accelerate decarbonization at core suppliers in China and support the company’s Impact Agenda 2030 goals. The move targets 100% renewable electricity in core supplier operations in China by 2030 and a 60% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions. Lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU), trading at around $118.77, has been under pressure,...
